question: Will Ronaldo Caiado be confirmed as a presidential pre-candidate in Brazil by May 1, 2026?

evidences.title: Caiado se lança pré-candidato à Presidência pelo União Brasil em evento em Salvador | G1
evidences.content: Ronaldo Caiado é anunciado como pré-candidato à presidência O governador de Goiás, Ronaldo Caiado (União Brasil), anunciou nesta sexta-feira (4) sua pré-candidatura para a presidência da República nas eleições de 2026. Caiado fez o anúncio de sua pré-candidatura em conversa com jornalistas, antes da cerimônia em Salvador para recebimento do título "Cidadão Baiano e Comenda 2 de Julho". > "Nosso assunto aqui é lançar à pré-candidatura, levar essa prévia junto a população brasileira. Esse é o motivo da decisão do União Brasil em poder caminhar, com tempo, para que as pessoas nos conheçam. Quem conhece o governo de Caiado, vota em Caiado", disse o governador de Goiás. Caciques do União Brasil faltam a evento para lançar Caiado ao Planalto; partido enfrenta disputa interna [...] # Caiado se lança pré-candidato à Presidência pelo União Brasil em evento em Salvador ## Governador de Goiás reuniu políticos e apoiadores nesta sexta-feira (4), no Centro de Convenções da capital baiana. evidences.title: Ronaldo Caiado é oficializado pré-candidato do PSD e cita anistia a Bolsonaro como 1º ato na Presidência | G1
evidences.content: # Ronaldo Caiado é oficializado pré-candidato do PSD e cita anistia a Bolsonaro como 1º ato na Presidência ## Governador de Goiás disputava indicação internamente com Eduardo Leite e Ratinho Júnior, que desistiu da disputa na semana passada. Por Redação g1 SP, TV Globo e GloboNews — São Paulo 30/03/2026 16h12 Atualizado 30/03/2026 O governador de Goiás, Ronaldo Caiado, teve confirmada a sua pré-candidatura à Presidência da República pelo Partido Social Democrático (PSD). O anúncio foi oficializado por Gilberto Kassab, presidente nacional da legenda, durante coletiva de imprensa em São Paulo nesta segunda-feira (30). [...] Caiado havia oficializado, em 14 de março, sua filiação ao PSD, em um movimento para viabilizar a candidatura presidencial. O ato ocorreu em Jaraguá, a cerca de 120 km de Goiânia. Durante o evento, o governador apresentou seu vice, Daniel Vilela, como pré-candidato à sucessão no governo estadual. No PSD, disputavam a indicação para a Presidência, além de Caiado, os governadores Ratinho Júnior e Eduardo Leite. Leite havia migrado do PSDB para o PSD em maio de 2025. evidences.title: Goiás governor positions himself for 2026 race despite political uncertainty
evidences.content: Brazil Union currently holds the ministries of Tourism, led by Celso Sabino, and Communications, under Juscelino Filho. The Minister of Regional Development, Waldez Góes (Democratic Labor Party), was appointed by Senate President Davi Alcolumbre (Brazil Union). Without the support of this faction of the party, Mr. Caiado is expected to launch his pre-campaign with an event in Salvador on April 4. The party remains allied with Bolsonaro’s Liberal Party in states like Rio de Janeiro and Bahia, where Mr. Caiado’s candidacy will be announced. The governor believes a bill granting amnesty to Mr. Bolsonaro, allowing him to run in the next election, is a realistic possibility. [...] Ronaldo Caiado — Foto: Brenno Carvalho/Agência O Globo Eighteen days before launching his pre-candidacy for the 2026 presidential election, Goiás Governor Ronaldo Caiado (Brazil Union) said that he is ready to run under any circumstances, even against former President Jair Bolsonaro (Liberal Party), and despite divisions within his party, some of whose members align with President Lula’s administration. evidences.title: With the promise of amnesty, Caiado is announced as a PSD pre-candidate for Planalto - Facto News
evidences.content: Facto News Facto News # With the promise of amnesty, Caiado is announced as a PSD pre-candidate for Planalto With the promise of amnesty, Caiado is announced as a PSD pre-candidate for Planalto The PSD officially announced, this Monday (30), the governor of Goiás, Ronaldo Caiado, as the party’s pre-candidate for President. The announcement took place in the afternoon, during an event at the acronym’s headquarters in São Paulo. Caiado’s choice comes after the governor of Paraná, Ratinho Júnior, withdrew from running for the election and amid protests from the governor of Rio Grande do Sul, Eduardo Leite, who had declared his interest in being the party’s candidate. [...] “The PSD has completed this important stage of defining our pre-candidacy and also candidate for the Presidency of the Republic, soon. A difficult choice and a privilege, because it is a privilege for the party to have the opportunity to define a choice having three excellent candidates, three governors who are very well evaluated in their states”, stated the party president, Gilberto Kassab, during a press conference. “A difficult choice and a privilege, because it is a privilege for the party to have the opport...

evidences.title: Ronaldo Caiado Announces Presidential Candidacy Amid Party Challenges
evidences.content: Search The Brazil Eye The Brazil Eye Latest # Ronaldo Caiado Announces Presidential Candidacy Amid Party Challenges The Governor of Goiás, Ronaldo Caiado, has officially declared his intention to run for the presidency of Brazil, launching his pre-campaign in Salvador on April 4. Caiado, representing the União Brasil party, faces significant hurdles as he seeks to unify his party, which has shown divisions regarding his candidacy. Notably absent from the launch event was Antônio Rueda, the president of União Brasil, highlighting the internal conflicts within the party. Many members are waiting for a decision from former President Jair Bolsonaro, who, despite being ineligible to run for office at present, still harbors hopes of overturning his legal challenges. [...] As he positions himself for the upcoming 2026 elections, Caiado is contending with other potential candidates from the right, such as Ratinho Júnior, the Governor of Paraná. Ratinho Júnior recently met with Bolsonaro, who has yet to endorse any candidate for the presidency but continues to play a significant role in shaping political alignments. In addition to bolstering his own campaign, Caiado's pre-candidacy is se...

evidences.title: Caiado costura apoio externos e enfrenta rejeição no União Brasil
evidences.content: Ouça este conteúdo Apesar de não ser uma unanimidade dentro do próprio partido, o governador de Goiás, Ronaldo Caiado, lançou a pré-candidatura presidencial para as eleições de 2026 pelo União Brasil, no início do mês. A lista dos presentes e a ausência de lideranças do partido no evento em Salvador (BA) evidenciam a cisão interna no União Brasil em relação à corrida pelo Palácio do Planalto. De um lado, a sigla possui opositores históricos ao petismo, no entanto, a legenda integra o governo Lula no comando de três ministérios. [...] Caiado e Ratinho Junior dão largada rumo a 2026 ## Federação com PP pode consolidar projeto presidenciável de Caiado Com 100% do apoio do União ainda longe da realidade, Caiado conta com o engajamento de políticos de outras siglas que se manifestaram em favor da pré-candidatura presidencial própria. E a principal aposta de Caiado é o anúncio da federação negociada entre União Brasil e PP, que pode sacramentar o nome do governador como pré-candidato da nova federação partidária. Do lado do Progressistas, a senadora Tereza Cristina - ex-ministra do governo Jair Bolsonaro (PL) - aparece entre as opções de presidenciáveis. [...] Por outro lado, o presid...

evidences.title: Three conservative governors vie for one presidential slot
evidences.content: Earlier on Tuesday, Caiado had already confirmed he would leave Brazil Union. In an interview with Novabrasil radio in Goinia, he said he would go “all the way” in the presidential race. Caiado launched his bid in April 2025, a year and a half before the election. “I already informed the party leadership—[Antonio] Rueda and ACM Neto, who is like a brother to me—that I understand the party’s difficulties, but in this situation I need to look for an alternative party to run,” he said. [...] Presidential hopeful and Goiás Governor Ronaldo Caiado announced on Tuesday night (27) that he will leave Brazil Union and join the Social Democratic Party (PSD). The announcement came via a video posted on social media in which Caiado appears alongside governors Eduardo Leite, of Rio Grande do Sul, and Ratinho Jr., of Paraná. Both governors are also seen as potential presidential contenders within PSD, which, despite its name, is rather a centrist-to-right-wing, highly pragmatic party. According to Caiado, whoever emerges as the viable candidate from this trio will receive the backing of the others. [...] “You know I’ve belonged to the same party since the start of my political career. But at...

evidences.title: Three conservative governors vie for one presidential slot
evidences.content: Presidential hopeful and Goiás Governor Ronaldo Caiado announced on Tuesday night (27) that he will leave Brazil Union and join the Social Democratic Party (PSD). The announcement came via a video posted on social media in which Caiado appears alongside governors Eduardo Leite, of Rio Grande do Sul, and Ratinho Jr., of Paraná. Both governors are also seen as potential presidential contenders within PSD, which, despite its name, is rather a centrist-to-right-wing, highly pragmatic party. According to Caiado, whoever emerges as the viable candidate from this trio will receive the backing of the others. [...] Caiado said he had warned Brazil Union’s leadership about his departure since late 2025. “This has already been discussed. I can’t wait any longer,” he said. He had received invitations from Solidarity and was also in talks with Podemos. By leaving Brazil Union, Caiado will forfeit the party structure, including one of the largest shares of public campaign funding and free television airtime. According to a Genial/Quaest poll released in January, Caiado polls between 3% and 5% in first-round voting intentions, depending on the scenario. Ratinho Jr. would garner between 7% and...

evidences.title: Ronaldo Caiado lança pré-candidatura à Presidência e tenta unir partido | CNN Brasil
evidences.content: Outro nome cotado pela direita para 2026 é o do governador do Paraná, Ratinho Júnior, do PSD, que almoçou nesta sexta-feira (4) com Bolsonaro na sede do governo do estado em Curitiba. O ex-presidente evitou dizer se apoiaria Ratinho Júnior para a presidência, mas fez elogios ao governador, de quem busca apoio público à pauta da anistia aos condenados pelo 8 de janeiro. No domingo (6), Jair Bolsonaro participa na avenida Paulista, em São Paulo, de mais um ato pela libertação dos envolvidos nos ataques de 8 de janeiro. Em nova aposta para fortalecer a pauta, o deputado federal, Nikolas Ferreira, gravou um vídeo repetindo a fórmula utilizada na época da crise do Pix, quando seu conteúdo viralizou e causou problemas ao governo. evidences.title: Center-right bid in Brazil calls for amnesty to ease polarization
evidences.content: Valor International / Politics Entrar Minha conta Sair Politics # Center-right bid in Brazil calls for amnesty to ease polarization ## Goiás governor Ronaldo Caiado launches presidential run after securing party backing Por Joelmir Tavares , Cristiane Agostine , Sofia Aguiar e Mariana Andrade — São Paulo and Brasília Ronaldo Caiado — Foto: Edilson Dantas/O Globo/i.s3.glbimg.com/v1/AUTH_63b422c2caee4269b8b34177e8876b93/internal_photos/bs/2026/z/x/2qAhVNSnyrVmdALLAw5w/foto31pol-101-psd-a14.jpg) Ronaldo Caiado — Foto: Edilson Dantas/O Globo [...] Ronaldo Caiado — Foto: Edilson Dantas/O Globo The governor of Goiás, Ronaldo Caiado, launched his presidential bid, declaring himself independent and promising an amnesty as a way to “pacify” the country. Speaking in São Paulo on Monday, after securing his party’s nomination, he reached out to right-leaning voters while criticizing the federal government. He said polarization is holding Brazil back and presented himself as an alternative to President Lula’s Workers’ Party (PT) and to the Liberal Party (PL), led by Senator Flávio Bolsonaro. Paraná governor exits presidential race, reshaping centrist field Campaign sees battle of rejections...

evidences.title: Polls show a second round tie between Lula and Flávio Bolsonaro : Peoples Dispatch
evidences.content: This is the first poll since Ronaldo Caiado (Social Christian Party, PSC), another right-wing politician, officially entered the race as a pre-candidate. In a potential second round against Lula, Caiado appears to hold 42% of the voting intention, compared to 45% for the Workers’ Party candidate. The scenario is the same when the poll projects a contest between the current president and the governor of Minas Gerais, Romeu Zema (New Party, Novo). He receives 45% to 42% for Lula. Datafolha also conducted first-round simulations, and President Lula leads in all scenarios presented.
